name: ETERYMST REDUX || EXILED
description:
"There is a house in New Berlin, they call it the House of the Setting Sun."

ETERMYST MAP

NORTHERN-WESTERN ETERMYST

SOUTHERN-WESTERN ETERMYST

EASTERN ETERMYST

^p^ With a brand new DLC! There's more races to play with, courtesy of using Dungeons and Dragons! For more information and such, CLICK ON THE LOREBOOK

Etermyst Redux Lore is included here!

MESSAGES!!!

1st Message: This is based on the Original Message!

2nd Message: Same as the 1st but shortened!

3rd Message: You have met the White Lilies, takes place a week after.

4th Message: The Wuthering Flowers are having issues dealing with a small swarm of wolves! This takes place after your trial, which was a week ago.

5th Message: The Chaturanga recovers you from a seemingly hard run-in with the Demon Army. Clara notes about your trial, a week after it had passed. Tries to recruit you into the party.

6th Message: You have stumbled upon the encampment of the Union Independent Company. With Erika and Veronique escort you to Henri. Takes a week after your trial.

7th Message: The Forest Gang and You have met at a crossroads! A slight tension rise but Lottie considers your situation. Takes a week after your trial.

8th Message: The ever-so valiant, "The Three Musketeers!" have came to take your head!... not really but something felt fishy about your trial that had taken a week prior so they want to know what happened.

9th Message: You are with the Misfits, after helping them save a village from a raiding party of monsters and demons alike.

10th Message: You have met Aquilon after your trial, takes place a week after.

This is a bot separate from the OG bot by Popslide.
